entity.label: Silla
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A highway; a twig, only in 2 Kings 12:20. If taken as a proper name (as in the LXX. and other versions), the locality is unknown.

nodes.label: Silla
nodes.description: A highway; a twig, only in 2 Kings 12:20. If taken as a proper name (as in the LXX. and other versions), the locality is unknown.

verses.text: And his servants arose, and made a conspiracy, and slew Joash in the house of Millo, which goeth down to Silla.
